message:
feat(session_retention): Cx-first structured-concurrency entry point (ft-xbnl0.2.2)

Add cleanup_sessions_async_cx so SQLite cleanup honors the caller's
capability context at the blocking-work boundary. Two Cx checkpoints
(before spawn_blocking handoff and after the join) let a canceled
caller skip the blocking work entirely or abort result propagation if
cancellation arrived late.

New Cx-first API (asupersync-runtime only):
- cleanup_sessions_async_cx(cx: &Cx, db_path, config)

The existing cleanup_sessions_async builds a request Cx via
cx::for_request() under asupersync-runtime and delegates to the _cx
variant (matching the pool.rs / retry.rs / caut.rs pattern). Non-
asupersync fallback uses cleanup_sessions_async_inner.

New deterministic LabRuntime test:
- cleanup_sessions_async_cx_runs_under_labruntime (seed 0x5E55_1022_C410_D0BE):
  drives cleanup_sessions_async_cx against a nonexistent DB path under
  virtual time and asserts the error surface in <2s wall-clock. Proves
  spawn_blocking handoff + result plumbing run under LabRuntime
  scheduling without wall-clock dependence.

This is the third file in the ft-xbnl0.2.2 Cx-first lane (after
retry.rs / f4fbb7d4 and caut.rs / 151d689c). Remaining inventory:
12 files, largest of which (runtime.rs) is still owned by wa-1m7nk.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc1-target):
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm session_retention::: 49/49 pass
- cargo clippy --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo check --lib (default features): pass
- scripts/check_no_runtime_regression.sh: ft-xbnl0.2.6 gate still passes
- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check: clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
